member.name: T:vbHtmlGridHelper.GridViewSummary
member.summary: A class that represents a summary operation defined to a column

member.name: E:vbHtmlGridHelper.GridViewHelper.GroupStart
member.summary: Event triggered when a new group starts

member.name: E:vbHtmlGridHelper.GridViewHelper.GroupEnd
member.summary: Event triggered when a group ends

member.name: E:vbHtmlGridHelper.GridViewHelper.GroupHeader
member.summary: Event triggered after a row for group header be inserted

member.name: E:vbHtmlGridHelper.GridViewHelper.GroupSummary
member.summary: Event triggered after a row for group summary be inserted

member.name: E:vbHtmlGridHelper.GridViewHelper.GeneralSummary
member.summary: Event triggered after the general summaries be generated

member.name: E:vbHtmlGridHelper.GridViewHelper.FooterDataBound
member.summary: Event triggered when the footer is databound

member.name: M:vbHtmlGridHelper.GridViewHelper.EvaluateEquals(vbHtmlGridHelper.GridViewGroup,System.Object)
member.summary: Compares the actual group values with the values of the current dataitem

member.name: M:vbHtmlGridHelper.GridViewHelper.InsertGridRow(System.Web.UI.WebControls.GridViewRow,vbHtmlGridHelper.GridViewGroup)
member.summary: Inserts a grid row. Only cells required for the summary results will be created (except if GenerateAllCellsOnSummaryRow is true). The group will be checked for columns with summary

member.name: M:vbHtmlGridHelper.GridViewHelper.GenerateGeneralSummaries(System.Web.UI.WebControls.GridViewRowEventArgs)
member.summary: Generates the general summaries in the grid.

member.name: M:vbHtmlGridHelper.GridViewHelper.ResolveCellIndex(System.Web.UI.WebControls.GridViewRow,System.Int32)
member.summary: Identifies the equivalent index on a row that contains cells with colspan

member.name: M:vbHtmlGridHelper.GridViewHelper.HideColumnsWithoutGroupSummary
member.summary: This method must be called to hide columns that doesn't have any summary operation when we are using a suppress group

member.name: M:vbHtmlGridHelper.GridViewHelper.InsertGridRow(System.Web.UI.WebControls.GridViewRow)
member.summary: Inserts a grid row with one cell only

member.name: T:vbHtmlGridHelper.GridViewHelper
member.summary: A class to allow you to add summaries and groups to a GridView, easily!

member.name: T:vbHtmlGridHelper.GridViewGroup
member.summary: A class that represents a group consisting of a set of columns
